## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `npm test` is green
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` pass
- [ ] Ama still re-indexes its own source cleanly (self-index test)

- [ ] Capability tiers reported honestly (no baseline-only result presented as complete)
